---
title: "Task <N>: <Purpose>"
subtitle: "PROJECT NAME – UNC Kenan-Flagler Business School"
author: 
  - name: "William Clinton Co"
    email: "clinton.will.c@gmail.com"
date: today
date-format: "MMMM D, YYYY"
abstract: |
  Brief summary of this week's progress.

format:
  pdf:
    fig-pos: "H"
    documentclass: article
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        \usepackage{float}
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
    geometry:
      - margin=1in
---

<!--
=============================================================================
RELATIVE PATH REFERENCE  (this file lives in docs/weekly_reports/)
=============================================================================
All paths are relative to THIS file's location.

  Raw data:          ../../data/0_raw/<dataset>/
  Processed data:    ../../data/1_derived/<dataset>/
  Figures:           ../../output/2_analysis/figures/<figure>.png
  LaTeX tables:      ../../output/2_analysis/tables/<table>.tex
  Temp files:        ../../temp/2_analysis/<task>/

R example (knitr chunk):
  data <- read.csv("../../data/1_derived/<dataset>.csv")
  # or with here():
  # data <- read.csv(here::here("data/1_derived/<dataset>.csv"))

Figure example:
  ![Caption](../../output/2_analysis/figures/<figure>.png){#fig-label}

LaTeX table example:
  ```{=latex}
  \input{../../output/2_analysis/tables/<table>.tex}
  ```

Rule: NEVER use absolute paths. If you move this file, update paths accordingly.
=============================================================================
-->

# This Week's Progress

Brief narrative of what was accomplished.

## Tasks Completed

- Task 1
- Task 2

## Tasks In Progress

- Task in progress 1

# Data Work

## Data Cleaning

Describe any data cleaning steps taken.

## Summary Statistics

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| label: setup

source(here::here("source/lib/theme_healy.R"))
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| label: tbl-summary-stats
#| tbl-cap: "Summary Statistics"

# library(knitr)
# data <- read.csv("../../data/1_derived/<dataset>.csv")
# kable(data)
```

## Figures

<!-- 
![Caption](../../output/2_analysis/figures/<figure>.png){#fig-label}
-->

# Analysis

## Regression Results

```{=latex}
% \input{../../output/2_analysis/tables/<table>.tex}
```

## Interpretation

Notes on results.

# Issues and Questions

List any blockers, data quality concerns, or methodological questions for the PI.

1. 
2. 

# Next Steps

- [ ] Task for next week 1
- [ ] Task for next week 2

# Appendix {.appendix}

Supporting tables, robustness checks, or supplementary figures.
